events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The torque sequence violation (deviating from the OEM star/spiral center-outward pattern) means clamp load across the joint can't be trusted even if individual bolts hit nominal torque — decision is `fail`, risk `high`. Corrective path: back off all fasteners, re-inspect the flange/gasket, and restart with the correct staged (snug → intermediate → final) star/spiral sequence before continuing.
